strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, and React across multiple senior roles
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background — TDD practitioner, built Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner, taught Selenium/TDD courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed in skills; Java present but appears limited to older robotics/embedded work
Vitest not explicitly cited, though Jest-family/test-framework expertise is strongly implied
response.justification: Candidate clearly meets the 6+ years full-stack bar with concrete TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB delivery at Optilyz and RIDE, plus current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq that directly maps to the AI agent requirement. Testing expertise is exceptional — authored a D test runner and assertion library, taught TDD courses. Cloud (AWS CDK) and Docker/Kubernetes are evidenced via Optilyz and GISCollective. Gaps: Nest.js is not named, Kotlin is absent, and Vitest specifically is not cited though the broader testing competency is over-indexed. On balance, evidence strongly supports core competencies with framework-specific ramp-up needed.
